title: Sousou no Frieren
description: With the help of this resource, you will be able to play with items from the anime Sousou no Frieren, renamed anvil bow,axe.
body:
# Need ([Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)) or ([CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn))
Changes the Minecraft model to a custom one when renaming items such as the bow, sword, carved pumpkin, breastplate, and shield in anvils.
Items and how to rename them are written below.
![GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vESzhaIA/images/5f35373c573c9b748b75b185c8246928251ea74f.gif)
## Bow

-  Frieren Staff

-  Fern Staff

## Axe

- Stark Axe
___________________________________________________________________________
- To remodel an item, rename a compatible weapon in an anvil to its name.
![Anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vESzhaIA/images/0e47bad91126bd196066cee12946eeb8b5b23272.png)
